entity.description: FairPrice Extra Large Adult Wipes come with a pH balanced, quick dry and non-sticky formula enriched with aloe vera extracts, making them gentle on the skin. Thick and soft, 1 piece of FairPrice Extra Large Adult Wipe is enough to clean easily and effectively. It is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

displayMetadata.name: PREPARATION
displayMetadata.value: Tear open the sticker and use the wipes. After use, immediately reseal the pack to avoid moisture evaporation.

displayMetadata.name: STORAGE INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: Store in a cool, dry place

displayMetadata.name: INGREDIENTS
displayMetadata.value: Purified Water, Phenoxyethanol, Aloe Barbadenis Leaf Juice, Sodium Gluconate, Chlorphensin, Polysorbate 20, Chlorhexidine Digluconate, Isopentyldiol, Glycerin.

displayMetadata.name: ADDITIONAL INFORMATION
displayMetadata.value: FairPrice Extra Large Adult Wipes come with a pH balanced, quick dry and non-sticky formula enriched with aloe vera extracts, making them gentle on the skin. Thick and soft, 1 piece of FairPrice Extra Large Adult Wipe is enough to clean easily and effectively. It is suitable for all skin types, including sensitive skin.

metaData.Key Information:

- 0% Fragrance, Alcohol & Paraben
- Cleans effectively with large size wipes (30cm x 20cm)

product.description:
This product has a superb absorbent core which allows dual absorption zone for quick absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry. It has an effective Leakage Protection to ensure optimum leakage security. It has a breathable backsheet
that allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort. It provides ease of removal. It has a 360˚ soft elastic waistband
that provides comfortable fit even when on the move. It has a blue elastic lines on back of pants to make it easy for wearer to determine the front and back of pants. It has a wetness indicator that changes colour when wet. Regular changing is recommended to keep wearer comfortable.

metaData.Key Information:
• A superb absorbent core which allows dual absorption zone for quick absorption and retention of liquid that keeps skin dry
• Effective leakage protection to ensure optimum leakage security
• Breathable backsheet that allows good air-flow through, providing maximum comfort
• Provides ease of removal
• 360˚ soft elastic waistband that provides comfortable fit even when on the move
• Blue elastic lines on back of pants to make it easy for wearer to determine the front and back of pants
• Wetness indicator that changes colour when wet
metaData.Preparation:
• How to remove & dispose:
1. Tear off seams on both sides to remove
2. Roll up soiled diaper pants and discard into disposal bag

• Specially developed to remove milk, urine and fecal stains effectively from babywear
• Suitable for hand wash and top load machine
